name: CMON Limited
summary: CMON Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the design, development, and sale of board games, miniatures, and other hobby products in North America, Europe, Oceania, Asia, South America, and Africa. The company publishes self-owned and licensed games; and publishes, distributes, and sells tabletop hobby games. It also provides sales administrative services. The company sells its tabletop games primarily through the Kickstarter platform and wholesalers, as well as directly to end-users through its online store and at game conventions. CMON Limited was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Singapore.
